Who I Am

Engineer.
Meditator.
Mentor.

30+Years of Mastery
300+Organisations
2×Profit Growth
🌟
The Journey

श्री मिश्री लाल जी सुरिया — the Peaceful Profit Monk — is Managing Director of Here Quality Excellence Pvt. Ltd., Vadodara. A Mechanical Engineer, he has devoted over three decades to guiding organisations toward excellence through Indian spiritual wisdom.

⚙️
Precision Meets Spirituality

As a ZED Master Trainer certified by QCI (Govt. of India) and a Master Trainer in Dhyan, he bridges engineering precision, quality management rigour, and Indian spiritual tradition into one unified practice.

🪷
The 4R Framework & Open Sessions

His daily virtual Swadhyaya and Dhyan sessions are open to all. Through listening and practice, anyone can access the 4R Framework — Rupees (सम्पत्ति), Respect (सम्मान), Relations (सम्बन्ध), and Rest (समाधि).

☸️
Holistic Vision

He places special emphasis on Holistic Vision (Samyak-Darshan) from Jainvani and the Gita's Samatvam Yoga Uchyate as the inner technology that makes all four R's naturally available.

Read Full Story →

The Framework

The 4R Path
to Fulfilment

Through Swadhyaya and Dhyan, these four dimensions of a flourishing life become naturally accessible to every sincere seeker.

1
Rupeesसम्पत्ति

Lasting prosperity aligned with dharma and purposeful, ethical enterprise.

2
Relation & Respectसम्बन्ध और सम्मान

Real harmony is seen at home: when a mother-in-law and her son's wife relate with empathy, dignity, and mutual respect.

3
Restआराम

True rest is inner calm: a steady mind, balanced breath, and deep recovery amidst work, family, and responsibility.

4
Readingपठन

Reading sharpens judgment: when you practice the previous R's consistently, this R helps you generate more Rupees with clarity.

Philosophy

Inner Technology for Outer Excellence

Ancient wisdom traditions form the spiritual backbone of all teachings — from Jain philosophy to the Bhagavad Gita.

सम्यक्-दर्शन

"Right Perception — seeing reality without distortion."

— Jainvani · Holistic Vision
समत्वं योग उच्यते

"Equanimity is Yoga — balance in success and failure."

— Bhagavad Gita
अनेकान्त

"Non-absolutism — understanding multiple perspectives."

— Jain Philosophy
Holistic Visionसम्यक्-दर्शन

The Jain principle of right perception — seeing reality as it is, enabling wise, ethical decisions in business and life.

Zero Philosophyशून्य दर्शन

Zero Waste · Zero Defect · Zero Effect · Zero Mind — India's quality mission powered by ancient spiritual inner technology.

Equanimityसमत्व

Balance in all situations — the Gita's teaching of performing action with equanimity, detached from outcomes.

Published Works

Featured Publications

Published works blending ancient wisdom with modern excellence — available for readers seeking clarity and transformation.

Zero Mind · Zero Waste · Zero Defect · Zero Effect
Zero Mind · Zero Waste · Zero Defect · Zero EffectWritten for Government of India

A framework linking ancient Indian spiritual wisdom with quality excellence, introducing Zero Mind as the inner base for external transformation.

Samyak Samadhan
Samyak SamadhanAuthor's Work

Explores right understanding, inner resolution, and practical life clarity. The book guides readers toward balanced decisions and peaceful progress.

View All Publications
What I Offer

Pathways to Transformation

01

Technique of Stressfree

Practical methods to reduce stress and build a calm, balanced mind in daily life.

02

Career Counselling

Guidance to choose the right career path based on strengths, goals, and long-term growth.

03

Career and Computze Counselling

Personalized guidance for career direction and growth through practical counselling.

04

How to Face Interview Confidently

Step-by-step mentoring to improve interview confidence, communication, and performance.

Structured Learning

Choose Your Path

Rishi Level
Foundation CourseRishi · Samyak Drashti · Free · One-day course

Samyak Drashti (Holistic Vision)

1 Day
Explore Course→
Muni-Sadhak Level
Crash CourseMuni-Sadhak · Rs 100 fee · 7 days · Up to 2 hours daily

7 Days (up to 2 hours daily)
Explore Course→
Yogeshwar · Arihant Level
Kevalya — DIY CourseYogeshwar · Arihant · 3-month deep course · Charges: contact mobile

3 Months

The Fourth R

The Power of Reading

1

4th R in the 4R pathway: Reading.

2

Reading builds clarity before action and strengthens decision quality.

3

Worth Rupees (4R): Read what improves your value, wisdom, and financial awareness.

4

Daily reading with reflection turns knowledge into practical results.
